case_title: YEE JEIN YAN VS. SALVADOR BOCANERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YAN, YEE JEIN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAN, YEE JEIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOCANERA, SALVADOR $675.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $725.00, $675 CHECK ALREADY TENDERED BY DEFENDANT'S INSURER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY YAN, YEE JEIN AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANERA, SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANERA, SALVADOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2018 BY RICHARD B. ULMER. PLAINTIFF YEE JEIN YAN IS PRESENT, PARTIALLY ASSISTED BY MANDARIN COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER AIDON NI #301135. PLAINTIFF REQUIRED A CANTONESE INTERPRETER OF WHICH COURT WAS NOT ABLE TO PROVIDE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED TO PROCEED IN ENGLISH AS BEST AS POSSIBLE, WITH INTERMITTEN ASSISTANCE AS NEEDED ONLY FROM COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDON NI, DUE TO PLAINTIFF SPEAKING BOTH MANDARIN AND CANTONESE DIALECTS. DEFENDANT SALVADOR BOCANERA IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT SALVADOR BOCANERA WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
